articles.author: Allegra Goodwin, Gianluca Mezzofiore, Thomas Bordeaux
articles.title: Photos appear to show US Tomahawk missile fragments at site of deadly Iran school strike - CNN
articles.description: Missile debris that Iranian officials claim was recovered from the deadly strikes which hit a naval base and elementary school in southern Iran on February 28 appears to be from an American Tomahawk cruise missile, according to CNN analysis.
articles.content: Missile debris that Iranian officials claim was recovered from the deadly strikes which hit an elementary school in southern Iran on February 28 appears to be from an American Tomahawk cruise missile… [+5265 chars]

articles.title: Trump says his bill would ‘guarantee the midterms.’ House Republicans are moving on. - Politico
articles.description: GOP leaders are not leaping to take immediate action on a new version of the SAVE America Act.
